metadata.name: Accessibility Audit
metadata.description: Run comprehensive WCAG 2.2 accessibility audits with severity-based findings, evidence collection, remediation guidance, and framework-specific fixes for Angular and React
metadata.author: Justice

skills.name: accessibility-audit
skills.description: Comprehensive WCAG 2.2 Level AA accessibility auditing with 4-phase process: automated extraction, framework-specific checks, manual/human-judgment checks, and report generation

commands.name: accessibility-audit
commands.description: Run a full WCAG 2.2 Level AA accessibility audit with severity-classified findings, CWE mapping, and remediation roadmap

target.description: Path to the file, component, or URL to audit

framework.description: Frontend framework in use: vanilla, angular, or react

severity_threshold.description: Minimum severity level to include in report: CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, or LOW

include_checklist.description: Include full WCAG 2.2 criterion checklist in report

commands.name: framework-accessibility-check
commands.description: Run framework-specific accessibility checks for Angular CDK A11y or React Aria patterns with targeted remediation guidance

target.description: Path to the component or module to check

framework.description: Framework to check: angular or react

commands.name: generate-remediation-roadmap
commands.description: Generate a prioritized remediation roadmap from audit findings with effort estimates, quick wins, and compliance impact

findings_path.description: Path to the audit findings file or report

sprint_capacity.description: Available developer hours per sprint for remediation

compliance_target.description: Target compliance standard: WCAG-AA, Section-508, or EAA
